titleStmt.title: SII 24.212: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 212. (A.R. No. 49 of 1936-37.) SAME WALL.

summary.p: Purports to be an order issued by the deity while seated on the throne called the ‘Sundara-Pāṇḍya’ under the pearl canopy called ‘Sundara-Pāṇḍya’, in the abhishēka-maṇḍapa in the temple on the day of Kārttigai festival, in respect of house-sites granted to the 32 bhaṭṭas in the newly formed colony the order to take effect from the month of Chittirai in the 10th year of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīḥ § perumāḷ prasāticcaruḷiṉa tirumukattukkuppaṭi § Etat trai lokya nirmmāṇatrāṇa samhārakāraṇam śrīmat śrīraṅganāthasya śāsanam śāśvatamparam 2ṉam Aṭukkaḷaippuṟamāṉa vikramacoḻaccaturvedimaṅkalattup paṭṭakaḷ pakkal pāṇṭi maṇṭalattu miḻalaikkūṟṟattu ṉaṭavilk kūṟṟattu śrī parāṉtakaṉallūr kaṭṭikkuṟicci Uṭaiyāṉ valai vicuvāṉ periya perumāḷāṉa kāliṅkarāyaṉ veytta Akaram kaliyukarāmaccaturvetimaṅkalattu
ppaṭṭakaḷukku ṉam kaliyaṉ ṉam nakṣatramāṉa kāttikaik (kāttikai) kaṇṇālattukkup puṟappaṭṭu Abhiṣeka maṇṭapattu cuṉtarapāṇṭiyaṉ paṉtalkkiḻ cuṉtarapāṇṭiyaṉ kaṭṭilil ṉam peṇṭukaḷoṭum kūṭa Iruṉtu caṭakopaṉ pāṭṭuk keḷānikka(ka) Iṉta vikramacoḻacaturvetimaṅkalattu paṭṭakaḷ pakkalile puñcaittiṭalil 2pa—m ṉañceyilum muppattiraṇṭu maṉaikku veṇṭu nilaṅkoṇṭu maṉai E ṭuttu muppattiraṇṭu paṭṭakaḷai vaittāṉ Eṉṟum Iṉta maṉai
kaḷ Eṭukkavum vāstuvukkum kāveri Āṟṟukkum pokiṟa peruvaḻikkum ṉāṭṭup peruvaḻi Inta Akarattu vāstuvukku Uḷpaṭukaiyil parivattaṉaiyāka viṭṭa nilat tukkum Iṉta paṭṭakaḷ pakkal vilai koṇṭa puñcey kuḻi toḷāyirattu Aiṉpatukkum viḷaiy nilam kuḻi ṉūṟṟāṟekālukkum Itukkuḷpaṭṭa pala vṛkṣaṅkaḷukkum kaṭamai kaḻittu virapāṇṭiyaṉ Eḻutiṉa Olaippaṭiye kaḻittu ṉam virapāṇṭiyaṉukkuppattāvatu cittiraimātam mutal tāṅkaḷ kāṇiyākap peṟṟu maṉai Eṭuttuk kuṭi Irukkavum Iṉta maṉaikaḷum Iṉta maṉai
ppuḻakkaṭaiyil palavṛkṣaṅkaḷum kāṇiyākap peṟa veṇumeṉṟum nam śrī raṅga nārāyaṇadāsaṉum nam viṭṭuk karumañ ceykiṟa periya perumāḷ dāsanum nam viṭṭuk kovaṇavarum kuṭavarum pāṭuvārum taḻai Eṭuppārum rāmānujaṉuṭaiyārkaḷum maṟṟum Aṉaittuk kottil Uḷḷārum namakkuc collukaiyil nam virapāṇṭi yaṉukkup pattāvatu cittirai mātam mutal tāṅkaḷ kāṇiyākak kaik koṇṭu maṉai muppattiraṇṭum Eṭuttu mup
pattiraṇṭu paṭṭakaḷ Irukkavum Iṉta maṉaippuḻakkaṭaiyil vaikkalām pala vṛkṣaṅkaḷum vaittut tāṅka(ṅka)ḷ kāṇiyāka Aṉupavikkavum Itukku Iṟuppāka kaṇakkil(p) pūṇṭuvarum paṇamum ṉellum nam virapāṇṭiyaṉ Olaippaṭiye kaḻittu Itukku Āṇṭoṉṟukku nam koṭṭakaāra nāḻiyāle nāṉāḻiney Āṇṭutoṟum nam karattile Aḷakkavum Inta maṉaikaḷum vāstuvum puḻaikkaṭaiyil phalavṛkṣaṅ kaḷum taṅ
kaḷukku candrādityavaṟ celvatākavum coṉṉom Ippaṭi ceyka Eḻutiṉāṉ tiru mantiraolai nalantikaḻ nārāyaṇappiriyaṉ tirumantra Olaināyakam śrī raṅganārāyaṇap piriyaṉ Eḻuttu tirumantra Olaināyakam pallavaṉ viḻupparaiyaṉ Eḻuttu Itu Iṟaiyāmaṅkuṭit talaimakaṉukkum Okkum § Itu Iṟaiyyāmaṅkuṭit talaimakaṉukkum Okkum §
Digital edition of SII 24.212 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
